targets.rawSql: SELECT b.started_at, b.strategy_name, b.params_hash, b.dataset_from, b.dataset_to, (b.metrics->'performance'->>'n_trades')::int AS n_trades, round(((b.metrics->'performance'->>'win_rate')::numeric) * 100, 1) AS win_rate_pct, round((b.metrics->'performance'->>'total_pnl')::numeric, 2) AS total_pnl, round((b.metrics->'risk_adjusted'->>'sharpe_per_trade')::numeric, 2) AS sharpe_trade, round((b.metrics->'risk_adjusted'->>'sharpe_daily')::numeric, 2) AS sharpe_daily, round((b.metrics->'risk_adjusted'->>'mdd_usd')::numeric, 2) AS mdd_usd, b.strategy_commit, b.data_source, b.report_path FROM research.backtests b ORDER BY b.started_at DESC LIMIT 25;

WITH latest AS (SELECT id FROM research.backtests ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT t.exit_ts AS time, SUM(t.pnl) OVER (ORDER BY t.exit_ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS equity FROM research.backtest_trades t JOIN latest ON t.backtest_id = latest.id ORDER BY t.exit_ts;

SELECT started_at, strategy_name, params_hash, verdict, (summary->>'n_splits')::int AS n_splits, round((summary->>'pnl_mean')::numeric, 2) AS pnl_mean, round((summary->>'win_rate_mean')::numeric * 100, 1) AS win_rate_mean_pct, (summary->>'tolerance')::numeric AS tolerance FROM research.walk_forward_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 25;
